description: Use this API to GROW a bus and all the connected buses up to the specified number of levels away in an active Slider diagram in the GUI. Requires a current network case. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. growbuslevels(busnumber, xposition, yposition, numlevels)

parameters.name: busnumber
parameters.description: Bus number of the bus to grow (no default). (input).

parameters.name: xposition
parameters.description: X coordinate of the bus on the slider diagram. (input).

parameters.name: yposition
parameters.description: Y coordinate of the bus on the slider diagram. (input).

parameters.name: numlevels
parameters.description: Number of levels; include all buses up to this number of connections from busnumber in the grow operation (no default). (input).
